brand: Signate Animal Health & Nutrition Pvt. Ltd.
notes: PDFs are image-based brochures. Text below is manually transcribed/summarized from brochure page images for website-development handoff; verify claims and dosage before publishing.

products.name: SigMin VC
products.headline: Organic chelated trace mineral-vitamin blend for dairy cattle.
products.ingredients_summary: Zinc, copper, manganese and ferrous glycinates, chromium propionate, magnesium, dicalcium phosphate, cobalt, selenium, iodine, vitamins AD3/E, biotin and niacin.
products.directions: 80-100 g daily for lactating cows and buffaloes; 50 g for non-lactating animals.

products.name: SigMin BIO
products.headline: Advanced chelated minerals, vitamins, enzymes, buffer, toxin binder, rumen-protected choline and active yeast.
key_benefits: Supports rumen health and pH balance
Improves energy metabolism and liver function
products.directions: 80-100 g daily for lactating cows and buffaloes; 50 g for non-lactating animals.

products.name: SigMin Ultra
products.category: Premium chelated minerals and vitamins for high-yielding dairy cattle
products.headline: Premium blend of organic minerals, vitamins, probiotics and rumen-protected amino acids.
products.directions: 80-100 g daily for lactating cows and buffaloes; 50 g for non-lactating animals.

products.name: SigMin V Plus
products.headline: Mineral-vitamin premix supporting milk yield, reproduction and overall health.
products.directions: 80-100 g daily for lactating cows and buffaloes; 50 g for non-lactating animals.

products.name: SigMin MAX
products.headline: Chelated trace minerals, microminerals and vitamins for milk yield, reproductive efficacy and health.
products.directions: Compound feed: 1-2 kg/MT; cows/buffaloes: 15-20 g/animal/day; goats/sheep: 5 g/animal/day.

products.name: SigMin PRO
products.headline: Chelated trace minerals and vitamins to support milk production, fertility and overall health.

products.name: TranSig CL
products.category: Transition mineral mix for close-up period
products.headline: Close-up premix for 21 days pre-calving to support transition and calcium mobilization.
key_benefits: Maintains optimal DCAD levels for calcium mobilization
Reduces risk of hypocalcemia and ketosis
Supports smooth metabolic transition before calving
Enhances liver function and energy metabolism
Strengthens immune function and overall health
Improves rumen function and early lactation performance
products.directions: 100-125 g/cow/day starting 21 days before calving or as directed by veterinarian.

products.name: TranSig FR
products.category: Transition mineral mix for fresh period
products.headline: Post-calving premix for the first 21 days to support energy balance and recovery.
key_benefits: Helps prevent ketosis and fatty liver syndrome
Enhances liver function and energy metabolism
Promotes rumen health and feed intake
Provides rapidly available energy for early lactation
Supports recovery, fertility and milk production performance
products.directions: 100-125 g/cow/day with routine mineral mix supplementation for 21 days after calving or as directed.

products.name: CalSig DS
products.category: Liquid calcium phosphorus with minerals and herbal galactagogues
products.headline: Liquid supplement with bioavailable calcium, phosphorus, vitamins, trace minerals and herbs.
